summary: Next.js 16 + React 19 demo app for Invesco wholesaler pitch. 4 working screens: App Launcher (home), Salesforce Meeting Brief (hero), Territory Dashboard, Signal Studio (NL queries), Mobile Brief. Static export exists in out/. Uses Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) styling, shadcn/ui components, mock data (500 advisors, $156B AUM). Includes error boundaries, demo reset overlay, synthetic data disclaimer. Well-structured for a pitch demo.

scores.revenue_potential_rationale: Invesco is a major asset manager. A successful demo could land a significant enterprise deal for ForwardLane. Direct client pitch tool.
scores.strategic_value_rationale: Core ForwardLane product demo for a named prospect. Salesforce-native look builds credibility. Shows AI signal intelligence across multiple surfaces.
scores.completeness_rationale: 4 of 6 apps functional (Analytics, Events are 'coming soon'). Static export works. Has mock data, error boundaries, reset overlay. Missing: real API integration, charts library (sparklines are hand-rolled SVG), no recharts/nivo.
scores.urgency_rationale: Git log shows active Invesco prep commits in last 48h. This is an imminent pitch demo.
scores.effort_remaining_rationale: Core screens exist and work. Remaining effort is polish, not foundation. ~2-4 days of focused work to make pitch-perfect.

tech_stack.ui: shadcn/ui + Radix UI + custom SLDS components
tech_stack.icons: Lucide React + custom SLDS SVG icons
tech_stack.data: Mock data (354 lines mock-data.ts + 5358 lines combined-data.ts)

screens.name: App Launcher
screens.notes: SF-style app grid, animated stats, clean branding

screens.name: Meeting Brief
screens.notes: 610 lines, hero screen, contact record AI intelligence

items.task: Add loading/transition animations between screens for wow factor
Add Invesco branding/colors alongside ForwardLane logo
Polish Salesforce Meeting Brief as the hero walkthrough screen
Add a scripted demo flow / guided tour mode (step-by-step highlights)
Ensure all mock data tells a coherent story (advisor at risk → signal → action → outcome)
Add a fake 'AI generating...' typing animation for Signal Studio responses
Pre-populate Signal Studio with 3-5 canned queries that demo well
Add one-click 'Reset Demo' that resets all state to pristine
Add keyboard shortcuts for screen navigation (1-4 keys)
Add 'Send to CRM' / 'Export' buttons that show success toast (no-op)
Deploy static export to a shareable URL (Vercel/Cloudflare Pages)
Test and fix responsive layout on iPhone 14/15 Pro viewport
Ensure Mobile Brief page has touch-friendly tap targets (min 44px)
Fix any horizontal scroll issues on mobile viewports
Add PWA manifest for 'Add to Home Screen' during demo
Verify App Launcher grid collapses to 2-col on mobile
Remove 'coming soon' apps or add minimal placeholder pages
Add proper chart library (recharts) for dashboard sparklines
Verify Docker build works for self-hosted demo option
